dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*
(I'm a little sleep-deprived.\n I couldn't fall asleep\n because I was thinking about Miku.)
(She's totally avoiding me, right?\n Why does she keep avoiding me?\n She even kept her distance during breakfast!)
Big bro?\nWhat's wrong?
O-oh, it's nothing.
(Ah, Miku's looking over here!)
Miku, what's wrong?
HUH?!\nWhat do you mean, what's wrong?
Well...
I-I'm totally fine.
Fu-kun, you look a little sleepy, don't you?\nThe bed wasn't comfortable after all?
N-no, the bed was extremely comfortable, okay?\nThat feeling of sinking into the mattress when you lay on it,\nit was truly a luxury hotel experience!
I know what you mean.\nI was sound asleep, I thought I wasn't going to be able to wake up.
Yeah...\nIt was a real chore trying to wake you up...
Even though the beds were very comfortable,\nit seems like Miku couldn't sleep either.
Huh...
You looked at your phone a few times\nbefore falling asleep, right?\nIt can negatively impact your sleep, you know?
Ah, sorry.\nI'll be more careful.
Please do.\nI'd rather not go sightseeing while someone is feeling drowsy.
Hey, Miku?
!...\nWhat's up, Futaro?
Well, um... Are you okay? Aren't you feeling sleepy?
I-I'm alright.\n...Thanks for worrying about me.
Well, it's only natural, isn't it?
(Maybe she's back to her old self?)
Today, let's start with Shurijo Castle.\nAfter that, we'll go to the Okinawa Prefectural Museum that Miku was looking forward to.
Yeah.\nI want to see the special exhibition\nthat's currently on display.
Cool, what kind of exhibition is it?
Umm...that's a surprise for when we get there.
Oh come on, just tell me.\nWell anyways I'm looking forward to it.
You're gonna l-look forward to it...
Yeah, well I hope it meets your expectations.
(Wh-why?!\n Why does she keep distancing herself from me?!)
Alright, let's go.
Finally, our Okinawa trip begins, Raiha-chan!\nLet's have some FUUUN!
Yeah!
Come on, Futaro-kun, you too, let's go.\nToday has only just begun.
Y-yeah.
